{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bleeding Wand
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Bleeding Wand]] is a two-foot long artifact of Ragnarus consisting of a [[ruby]] core with a dark wooden root.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Bleeding Wand]] is an artifact wielded by [[Adessa]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
